meta.source: EBA EU-Wide Transparency Exercise 2025 — Official CSV (Other Templates)
meta.description: IFRS 9 Stage 2 and Stage 3 (NPL) loan data — 85 banks — EBA Official Supervisory Data
meta.data_source: FINREP F18 Asset Quality template — amortised cost + FVOCI loans and advances — directly from EBA CSV
meta.notes: Values in EUR billions converted from EUR millions. Stage 2 ratio = Stage 2 / Total Loans. NPL ratio = Stage 3 / Total Loans. Total assets estimated from leverage exposure (×0.87 adjustment). NOTE: Spuerkeess (BCEE, LEI R7CQUF1DQM73HUTV1078) does not appear in the EBA 2025 Transparency Exercise CSV. The Luxembourg entry (LEI 9CZ7TVMR36CYD5TZBS50) has been correctly identified as BIL (Banque Internationale à Luxembourg). LEI verified against GLEIF registry and Spuerkeess official legal notices (spuerkeess.lu).

latest_eba_aggregate.reference: EBA Q2 2025 Risk Dashboard / RAR December 2025
